title: Fuspace's Texturepack
description:
Vanilla like texture upgrade
-3D textures-Animations-Restyled textures-Connected textures
body:
# **Fuspace's Texturepack**
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59a9cb05003e8cf8b70f0a56e147f2eb4b60900c.jpeg)
## 26.1.2 is released !
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6db089c0197d54c04368d2f930322827a471e946.jpeg)

## Work in progress
Released can be drop as new version of the pack and this pack can be continued trought new version !
> **If you want a personnalised pack, join Discord and ask me !**
## Changes
### 3D Textures
- Technical block
> Working station, Furnaces, Redstone dust & certains components
- Decorative block
> Doors, Trapdoors, Lantern, Chains, Hanging sign,...
- Natural block
> Beehive/nest, Moss carpet, Pumpkins, End portal, Sculks, Hay Bale, Bushes, crops,...
- Items
> Mace
### Connected Textures
- Glass block/pane
- Bookshelves (it's 3D & connected)
- Tuff_blocks
- Copper_blocks
- Copper_grates
### Animated Textures
- Campfires
- Some items (Gold_ingot, golden_carrot,...)
### Emissive :
- ⚠️ Optifine or Continuity is necessary to make emissives textures work !
- Minerals and ores blocks
- Firefly bush better emissive texture
- Redstones components (Redstone block, repeater, rails, crafter, observer,...)
- Torche flower
- Crying obsidian & respawn anchor
- Brewing stand
- Creaking heart, resin clump
### GUI changes
- Dark mode
- Hearts, armor, hunger, xp bar, ...
- Effects, enchantment, potion icons
- Information tooltips icons
### Items changes
- Tools
- Usable items
- HD Shields
> Fireworks, Blaze/Breeze rod, Disks, Minecarts, Spawneggs (not chicken egg)
- Doors
- Signs
- Flowers, Mushrooms, ...
- Banner parterns
- Rounded logs
### Bug fixes
- Iron bar
- Tools stitching
- Consistent pottery pot
- Consistent White arrows in menus
- Dripleaf stem fix
- Consistent bucket
- Updated top observer block
- Redstone 3D wire fix
- Corrected item holding
- Proper break particles
- Blaze's rod fix
- Deepslate ore top texture is now the top of deepslate
- Firefly bush better animation
### Blocks changes
- Suspicious sand/gravel have border
- Top of wall is more accurate

**Disponible en Français !**

**Available in English (UK, Australia, Canada) !**

**Disponible en español !**

**Disponível em português (Brazil) !**

**Disponibile in italiano !**

**Verfügbar auf Deutsch (Schweizerdeutsch) !**

**Dostępne w języku polskim !**

**Доступно на русском языке !**

## Loading :

- You need to use optifine or with fabric [continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) and [E.M.F.](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [E.T.F.](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to have full experience !
- Almost all the pack can be played in Vanilla !

## Texturepack used in that project :

- [GuiRetexture 1.13](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-retextures) by frugbug (Licenced MIT)

- [Unique Spawn Eggs](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/gouchnox/submissions) by Gouchnox (Licenced MIT)

- [Better_flames_particules 2.1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-flame-particles) by Tschipcraft (Permission to use from him)

- [Improved_Cake r0.1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/improved-cake) r0.1 by Pahan (Permission to use from him)

- [ConnectedCopperBlocks+ 0.0.1 (CCB+)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-copper-blocks) by 1_Jammy (Licensed CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 but permission to use)

- [Connected-Trials](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-trials) by 1_Jammy (Licensed CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 but permission to use) 

- [Fancy_Crops v1.0](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) Fancy_Crops v1.0 by bebebea_loste (Permission to use from him)

- [Detail-Brush-1.6](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detail-brush) by vectorwing (Permission to use from him)

- [Blocky-pointed-dripstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocky-pointed-dripstone) by poqbox (Licensed BSD-3-Clause)

- [DoorTweaks v3.4.2](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/door-tweaks) by StormDragon77  © 2021-2025 StormDragon77 | Some Rights Reserved | CC BY-NC-SA 4.0

- [Continuity texture (from the mod)](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) by PepperCode1 (Licensed LGPL-3.0-only)
  
- [Glowing trims v1.5](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-armor-trims-countxd) by CountXD (Permission to use from him)

- [Simply 3D v1.0.0](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply3d) by Konijnebeer (Licensed MIT)

- [Simply 3D Extras v1.0.0](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply3d-extras) by Konijnebeer (Licensed MIT)

- [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#pocXS5) (Licensed MIT)

## License

- This pack is in MIT License : You can use totaly or partialy the ressourcepack but you need to credit the original link and the autor (Fuspace).
- You can share your project in my Discord server !

### ⚠️ Some texture from packs above can be changed by myself !
If you find missing changes in the list, join discord !
